text:
Heavy Giraffes, an incredible species of highly social giraffes. The Heavy Giraffe lives in the ruins of the Team Fortress 2 facilities, running free, running happily. Those beautifull creatures are sandvichvores, which means they eat only on sandviches. All Heavy Giraffe carry something that they call "Sashas", which is their main weaponry. They use those metallic, heavy objects to kill any opponent separating them from their main food.
lol

text:
This movie is a great achievment. The juxtaposition of the Heavy and it's elongated neck is a deep drive at the economoic situation plaguing most countries today. The body so full of itself and the head so far away almost as if it were detatched, make a good counter-point.

The music illicited certain inner cries within your soul. Is the Heavy a tankard? Or is he a graceul mass of muscle? The music raises the question.

Heavy Giraffe indeed sir. Heavy Giraffe indeed.
